message:
fix(viewer): add cache-busting to prevent stale data on GitHub Pages updates

When deploying updates to GitHub Pages, CDN caching could cause the viewer
to serve stale data. The browser would fetch a cached config.json with an
old database hash, match it against OPFS cache, and serve outdated content
instead of fetching the new deployment.

This fix adds cache-busting query parameters (?_t=<timestamp>) to all
data-fetching operations:
- beads.sqlite3.config.json
- beads.sqlite3 database file
- Database chunks (for large DBs)
- triage.json
- history.json

This ensures fresh content is always fetched after deployments while
preserving OPFS caching for offline support when the hash matches.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
